verses.1: Deliver me, LORD, from evil men.
verses.2: those who devise mischief in their hearts.
verses.3: They have sharpened their tongues like a serpent.
verses.4: LORD, keep me from the hands of the wicked.
verses.5: The proud have hidden a snare for me,
verses.6: I said to the LORD, “You are my God.”
verses.7: LORD, the Lord, the strength of my salvation,
verses.8: LORD, don’t grant the desires of the wicked.
verses.9: As for the head of those who surround me,
verses.10: Let burning coals fall on them.
verses.11: An evil speaker won’t be established in the earth.
verses.12: I know that the LORD will maintain the cause of the afflicted,
verses.13: Surely the righteous will give thanks to your name.
